name: security
description: Security validation, vulnerability scanning, and compliance checking.
qualityReason: Too generic, overlaps with other skills
capabilities: Validate GPG and SSH key configuration
Run Bandit security scanner on Python code
Audit dependencies with pip-audit and Safety
author: ByronWilliamsCPA
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill containing no executable code. Both SKILL.md and skill-report.json are metadata and documentation files that describe security workflows and list example bash commands as documentation. No file system access, network calls, or code execution capabilities exist. All 12 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES caused by the scanner misidentifying documentation keywords as security vulnerabilities.
valueStatement: Security vulnerabilities in code and dependencies can expose your project to attacks. This skill provides automated validation of GPG and SSH keys, runs vulnerability scanners, and guides compliance checking for secure development practices.
userTitle: Validate security and scan for vulnerabilities
limitations: Does not cover all programming languages
Security tools must be installed separately

useCases.title: Automated Security Checks
useCases.description: Run comprehensive vulnerability scans across code and dependencies before deployment

useCases.title: Compliance Validation
useCases.description: Validate security configurations and signing keys for regulatory compliance

useCases.title: Bandit Integration
useCases.description: Scan Python code for common security issues using Bandit and Semgrep

promptTemplates.title: Scan project for vulnerabilities
promptTemplates.prompt: Run security scans on this project using Bandit, pip-audit, and Safety to identify vulnerabilities

promptTemplates.title: Validate signing keys
promptTemplates.prompt: Validate my GPG and SSH key configuration. Check git signing settings and ensure keys are properly set up

promptTemplates.title: Review OWASP compliance
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the code against OWASP Top 10 considerations. Check for injection risks, authentication issues, and data exposure

promptTemplates.title: Pre-commit security check
promptTemplates.prompt: Run a pre-commit security checklist. Verify no secrets in code, dependencies are scanned, and Bandit passes

bestPractices: Run security scans in CI/CD pipelines before merging code
Address all high and critical vulnerabilities before release
Keep security tools updated to detect the latest vulnerabilities
antiPatterns: Skipping security scans to meet deadlines
Deploying code with unfixed known vulnerabilities

faq.question: Which programming languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on Python security tools. Bandit scans Python code. pip-audit and Safety check Python dependencies.

faq.question: What severity levels do the scanners report?
faq.answer: Scanners report critical, high, medium, and low severity issues. Focus on addressing critical and high issues first.

faq.question: How do I integrate this with my CI/CD pipeline?
faq.answer: Add the security commands to your pipeline configuration. Run Bandit, pip-audit, and Safety as pre-deployment steps.

faq.question: Is my code and data safe when using these tools?
faq.answer: Yes. Security tools run locally and do not transmit code. They only analyze code for known vulnerability patterns.

faq.question: What if scans report false positives?
faq.answer: Review each finding manually. Use exclusion comments or configuration files to suppress false positives with explanations.

faq.question: How does this compare to cloud security services?
faq.answer: This skill runs local, lightweight scanners. Cloud services offer deeper analysis but require sending code externally.
